svg.title: COS344 P3 Project Plan
svg.desc: Architecture and shape mapping plan for the miniature golf windmill practical
svg.text: Windmill (reference: red frustum body, white blades)

g.text: Frustum body (trapezoid tower) — custom quad shape
Roof cap — triangular prism or cone on top
Flag pole — cylinder + triangular prism flag
W/S → rotate x-axis | A/D → rotate y-axis | E/Q → z-axis
I/K → y translate | L/J → x translate | O/U → z translate
Each matrix built from first principles (4×4 float array)
Toggle bool wireframeMode on Enter key press
Rotation axis = windmill front-face normal (z-axis local)

svg.text: matrix4 + transforms (rotation, translation, scale, perspective, lookAt)
mesh (VAO/VBO wrapper with solid + wireframe buffers)
shapes (cuboid, prism, cone, cylinder, frustum vertex generators)
course scene (ground, walls, hole, mat, plants)
input handling (all key bindings, rotor speed, wireframe toggle)
Makefile, student number window title, planning photo
